verse_text: and Joanna the wife of Chuza, Herod's steward, and Susanna, and many others who provided for Him from their substance.

links.context: They marveled not only that Jesus spoke with a Samaritan, but that He was speaking with an unaccompanied woman, which was potentially scandalous. For further instances of the Lord's dealings with women, see 7:53-8:11; 11:20-33; 20:11-18 (see also [[LUK.8:1]]-3).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
